name: kubectl get pv
example:
kubectl get pv
kubectl get pv -o wide
kubectl describe pv my-pv

name: kubectl get pvc
example:
kubectl get pvc
kubectl get pvc -n production
kubectl get pvc my-claim -o yaml

name: kubectl describe pv
description: PersistentVolumeの詳細情報を表示する

name: kubectl describe pvc
description: PersistentVolumeClaimの詳細情報・バインド状態を表示する
example:
kubectl describe pvc my-claim
kubectl describe pvc my-claim -n production

name: kubectl get storageclass
description: StorageClass一覧を表示する（scエイリアス使用可）
syntax:
kubectl get storageclass
kubectl get sc
example:
kubectl get storageclass
kubectl get sc
kubectl describe sc standard

name: kubectl delete pvc
description: PersistentVolumeClaimを削除する（PVのreclaim policyに注意）
example:
kubectl delete pvc my-claim
kubectl delete pvc my-claim -n production
